title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 507.130 - How appointed
text:
507.130.  How appointed. — Such appointment shall be made on the petition in writing of such infant, if of the age of fourteen years, and the written consent of the person proposed to be next friend to such infant acknowledged before, or proved to the court or officer making the appointment.
(RSMo 1939 § 861) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 710; 1919 § 1167; 1909 § 1741
